name: Enovis CORP
business: Enovis Corporation is a medical technology company that develops, manufactures, and distributes medical devices for reconstructive surgery, rehabilitation, pain management, and physical therapy. Its products address the continuum of patient care from injury prevention to joint replacement to rehabilitation. The company operates in two segments: Prevention & Recovery (non-surgical bracing, therapy products) and Reconstructive (surgical implants for joint replacement and extremity reconstruction).
sellsTo: Primary care and pain management physicians
Physical therapists, podiatrists, chiropractors, athletic trainers

exposures.sentence: We develop, manufacture and distribute high-quality medical devices and services across the continuum of patient care from injury prevention to joint replacement to rehabilitation after surgery, injury or from degenerative disease, enabling people to regain or maintain their natural motion.
Our offerings are supported by proprietary surgical techniques, surgeon education, and digital tools that enhance preoperative planning, intraoperative precision, and postoperative recovery.
